allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://rskfplsmhgbqbxnjxnmn.supabase.co/rest/v1/rpc/run_sql -H 'apikey: sb_publishable_Yg1bx6U0geUNeAZBN5o9fQ_GKG1lfSm' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query": "SELECT a.id, a.number, a.valid_to, a.type, l.id as lease_id, l.move_out_inspection_date, lt.tenant_id, t.last_name FROM apartments a LEFT JOIN leases l ON l.apartment_id = a.id AND \(l.move_out_inspection_date IS NULL OR l.move_out_inspection_date >= CURRENT_DATE\) LEFT JOIN lease_tenants lt ON lt.lease_id = l.id LEFT JOIN tenants t ON t.id = lt.tenant_id WHERE a.number IN \(22, 24, 29\) ORDER BY a.number::integer, l.id, lt.tenant_id"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://rskfplsmhgbqbxnjxnmn.supabase.co/rest/v1/rpc/run_sql" -H "apikey: sb_publishable_Yg1bx6U0geUNeAZBN5o9fQ_GKG1lfSm" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query": "SELECT a.id, a.number, a.valid_to, a.type, l.id as lease_id, l.move_out_inspection_date, lt.tenant_id, t.last_name FROM apartments a LEFT JOIN leases l ON l.apartment_id = a.id AND \(l.move_out_inspection_date IS NULL OR l.move_out_inspection_date >= CURRENT_DATE\) LEFT JOIN lease_tenants lt ON lt.lease_id = l.id LEFT JOIN tenants t ON t.id = lt.tenant_id WHERE a.number IN \(''22'', ''24'', ''29''\) ORDER BY a.number::integer, l.id, lt.tenant_id"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://rskfplsmhgbqbxnjxnmn.supabase.co/rest/v1/rpc/run_sql -H 'apikey: sb_publishable_Yg1bx6U0geUNeAZBN5o9fQ_GKG1lfSm' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query": "SELECT a.id, a.number, a.valid_to, a.type, l.id as lease_id, l.move_out_inspection_date, lt.tenant_id, t.last_name FROM apartments a LEFT JOIN leases l ON l.apartment_id = a.id AND \(l.move_out_inspection_date IS NULL OR l.move_out_inspection_date >= CURRENT_DATE\) LEFT JOIN lease_tenants lt ON lt.lease_id = l.id LEFT JOIN tenants t ON t.id = lt.tenant_id WHERE a.number IN \('\\''22'\\'', '\\''24'\\'', '\\''29'\\''\) ORDER BY a.number::integer, l.id, lt.tenant_id"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://rskfplsmhgbqbxnjxnmn.supabase.co/rest/v1/rpc/run_sql -H 'apikey: sb_publishable_Yg1bx6U0geUNeAZBN5o9fQ_GKG1lfSm' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query": "SELECT * FROM \(SELECT DISTINCT ON \(a.id\) a.id, a.number, l.id AS lease_id, t.last_name AS tenant_last_name, EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM rents r WHERE r.lease_id = l.id AND r.year = 2026 AND r.month = 4\) AS has_rent_this_month, EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM rents r WHERE r.lease_id = l.id AND r.year = 2026 AND r.month = 4 AND r.amount_received IS NOT NULL\) AS paid_this_month FROM apartments a JOIN buildings b ON b.id = a.building_id LEFT JOIN leases l ON l.apartment_id = a.id AND \(l.move_out_inspection_date IS NULL OR l.move_out_inspection_date >= CURRENT_DATE\) LEFT JOIN lease_tenants lt ON lt.lease_id = l.id LEFT JOIN tenants t ON t.id = lt.tenant_id WHERE \(a.valid_to IS NULL OR a.valid_to >= CURRENT_DATE\) AND a.type != '\\''BUREAU'\\'' ORDER BY a.id\) sub ORDER BY number::integer"}')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; rows=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['number'], r['lease_id'] and r['lease_id'][:8], r['tenant_last_name'], r['has_rent_this_month'], r['paid_this_month']\) for r in rows]")
